class NestedBlockPropagates {
    void m() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            if (fatal(e)) {
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            } else {
                log(e);
            }
        }
    }

    boolean fatal(Exception e) {
        return true;
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}

    void log(Exception e) {}
}
